name: Client Offboarding
description: Manages the professional and structured conclusion of client engagements, including handoffs, final deliverables, knowledge transfer, and archival.

en.trigger: Use when ending a client engagement — contract expiry, mutual termination, or client churn. Covers final reporting, asset handover, offboarding comms, and archival.
en.context: You are a client success specialist ensuring clean, professional client exits that preserve the relationship, protect agency reputation, and enable smooth knowledge transfer.
en.instructions:
## Client Offboarding Workflow

Execute a professional client offboarding:

- [ ] 1. Notice confirmation: Confirm termination date and notice period compliance
- [ ] 2. Final deliverables: Complete and deliver all outstanding work
- [ ] 3. Final reporting: Compile comprehensive performance summary for full engagement
- [ ] 4. Asset handover: Transfer all client assets, access, and documentation
- [ ] 5. Knowledge transfer: Document learnings, account history, and recommendations
- [ ] 6. Financial close: Settle final invoices and reclaim any credits
- [ ] 7. Exit communication: Send professional offboarding message and next-steps
- [ ] 8. Internal archival: Archive account files, credentials, and contacts

## Key Inputs
- Client: {{client_name}}
- Exit reason: {{exit_reason}}
- Final date: {{end_date}}
- Active deliverables: {{outstanding_work}}
en.output_template:
## Client Offboarding: {{client_name}}

### Exit Summary
| Field | Details |
|-------|---------|
| Exit reason | {{exit_reason}} |
| Final date | {{end_date}} |
| Notice given | ✅/❌ |
| Contract end | |

### Final Deliverables Status
| Deliverable | Status | Owner | Due |
|-------------|--------|-------|-----|
| | | | |

### Performance Summary (Full Engagement)
| Metric | Lifetime Value | Avg Monthly |
|--------|---------------|------------|
| Spend managed | | |
| Campaigns run | | |
| Leads generated | | |
| Revenue attributed | | |

### Asset Handover Checklist
- [ ] All creative files (logos, images, copy docs)
- [ ] Ad account admin access transferred
- [ ] Analytics access read-only or exported
- [ ] Landing pages and funnels documented
- [ ] Tracking pixels confirmed active
- [ ] Domain ownership verified
- [ ] Third-party tool accounts transferred
- [ ] Brand guidelines and style guides
- [ ] Historical performance data exported

### Financial Close
| Item | Amount | Status |
|------|--------|--------|
| Final invoice | | |
| Unbilled credits | | |
| Ad platform credits | | |
| Outstanding balance | | |

### Knowledge Transfer Document
**Account history:**
**What worked:**
**What to avoid:**
**Key contacts:**
**Recommendations for next agency:**

### Exit Communication
[Professional offboarding email/letter]

### Internal Archival
- [ ] All files moved to archive folder
- [ ] Credentials documented and secured
- [ ] Client contact retained (CRM)
- [ ] Lessons learned logged

variables.name: outstanding_work
variables.description: List of active deliverables needing completion

steps.name: Notice & Planning
steps.action: Confirm notice period and map all outstanding work

steps.name: Final Deliverables
steps.action: Complete all outstanding work to quality standard

steps.name: Asset Handover
steps.action: Transfer all client assets and access in organized format
steps.verify: Client confirms receipt of all assets

steps.name: Knowledge Documentation
steps.action: Document account history, learnings, and recommendations

steps.name: Financial Settlement
steps.action: Issue final invoice and reconcile all credits

examples.input: Offboard TechStart after 18 months. Reason: client pivoting internally. Final date: March 31. Outstanding: Q1 report and final campaign wrap.
examples.output: Full offboarding plan with performance summary, handover checklist, financial close, and archival instructions

checklist: All deliverables completed to client satisfaction
All assets transferred in organized, usable format
Exit communication is professional and positive
